task_hypothesis: Tune chunked-prefill scheduling under a long-prefill code trace, then preserve latency and goodput under a higher-QPS conversation-domain shift.

upstream_change.scope_note: PR 3853 is scheduler-only. PR 3884 is the first upstream merge explicitly described as end-to-end chunked prefill and is therefore the expert boundary.

trace_source.transformation: Subtract the first timestamp to obtain arrived_at seconds and rename token columns to num_prefill_tokens and num_decode_tokens. Existing Vidur files preserve every record; floating-point timestamp spellings are compared numerically.
trace_source.known_provenance_issue: The source description says the sample was collected on 2023-11-11, while every released CSV timestamp is on 2023-11-16. This must be clarified by the dataset maintainer before promotion.

candidate_comparison.name: Azure 2023 code development plus conversation shift
candidate_comparison.reason: The code trace has very long prefills and short decodes, while the conversation trace raises arrival rate and decode length. The pair exercises the mechanism and a plausible counterexample/domain shift.

candidate_comparison.name: Azure 2023 conversation-only replay
candidate_comparison.reason: It is a strong production replay but offers a weaker transfer question and makes one fixed chunk-size recipe easier to overfit.

candidate_comparison.name: vLLM PR 3853 patch reconstruction only
candidate_comparison.reason: PR 3853 is not end-to-end, and a patch-only prompt risks measuring recognition of a historical change instead of an experimental systems decision.

candidate_comparison.name: Azure 2024 DynamoLLM traces
candidate_comparison.reason: The longer collection window is attractive, but it changes the systems question toward cluster allocation and should not be mixed into the first scheduler candidate.

intended_split.development_domain: AzureLLMInferenceTrace_code.csv rows [2048:2176] for interaction and [2048:3072] for confirmation at native timing; full trace reserved for promotion
intended_split.final_domain: AzureLLMInferenceTrace_conv.csv rows [8192:8448] for interaction and [8192:10240] for confirmation at native timing; full trace and low-load counterexample remain promotion gates
intended_split.blindness_limit: Both upstream traces are public. Final selectors and hardware repetitions can be evaluator-private, but the source data cannot honestly be called secret.
intended_split.leakage_control: Do not expose the expert configuration as an answer; evaluate multiple load profiles and require a single submitted configuration or policy to transfer.
